title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0139 Castle House, Brentry Avenue, Bristol, BS5 0DL
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  Evans AV Staging Ltd  Site address:  Castle House, Brentry Avenue, Bristol, BS5 0DL  Description of proposed development:  Part demolition and re-building and erection of a second floor extension, to provide 8no. self-contained flats  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   TBC  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 9 December 2025   Date by when representations must be made 16 January 2026   Hearing date and venue TBC   Target Decision 3 February 2026   Decision date TBC     Hearing Documents  Decision  Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 16 January 2026.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, c/o QUADIENT, 69 Buckingham Avenue, Slough, SL1 4PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0139 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     Planning, Design and Access Statement  (PDF, 3.67 MB, 8 pages)  form 1 cil additional information  (PDF, 488 KB, 6 pages)  Energy Statement  (PDF, 1.09 MB, 8 pages)  EEGSL Phase I Desk Study B5065 Castle House Bristol  (PDF, 91.4 MB, 181 pages)  Castle House III  (PDF, 18 MB, 15 pages)  BNG exemption form  (PDF, 329 KB, 3 pages)  Arboricultural Report Castle House, Brentry Avenue, Bristol  (PDF, 1.67 MB, 13 pages)  application form  (PDF, 2.28 MB, 13 pages)  AE616 Castle House, Bristol - Preliminary Bat Roost Assessment  (PDF, 2.11 MB, 18 pages)  251203 Economic PR002744 FINAL  (PDF, 78.7 KB, 3 pages)  251110 PS PR002744 FINAL  (PDF, 957 KB, 26 pages)  250722-CH-TCP-NB  (PDF, 2.5 MB, 1 page)  250722-CH-AIA-NB  (PDF, 605 KB, 1 page)  25109 TS01 Castle House, Brentry Avenue Transport Statement  (PDF, 7.01 MB, 53 pages)   Questionnaire and supporting documents   S62A...
